Off Calendar Aug-19-2020 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

APPEARANCES VIA ZOOM VIDEOCONFERENCE:
Atty. JULIE M. CHOPOURIAN, Esq. of JMC Law Solutions (Tel: 916-634-7731) for Plaintiff
Herc Rentals, Inc.;
Atty. JOE BAUTISTA, Esq. of Seibert Bautista Montoya (Tel: 510-679-1981) for Defendant Desoto Cab Company dba Flywheel Taxi.

HEARING RE: PLAINTIFF HERC RENTALS INC. A DELAWARE CORPORATION's Motion To Compel Production Of Documents And Depositions And Request For Sanctions.

Both sides stipulate to the matter being decided by the judge pro tem. Counsel and the judge pro tem all appearing remotely authorize the clerk to sign the stipulation form on their behalf.

Matter argued and submitted. The Court takes the matter under submission.

Judge Pro Tem: Peter Vestal; Clerk: Sean Kane, Not Reported. (302/JPT)
